channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Services informatiques | TCS prévoit une baisse des embauches à cause de l’intelligence artificielle
item.description: Le géant indien des services informatiques Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) a déclaré mardi qu’il prévoyait de diminuer ses recrutements et d’intégrer « un demi-million d’agents d’IA » dans l’entreprise.

item.title: WWDC 2026: Everything announced on Siri AI, iOS 27, Apple Intelligence and more
item.description: Apple primarily made the case for an improved experience with its longstanding Siri assistant, which like most other announcements had a hefty helping of AI.

item.title: À 123 € au lieu de 149 €, l’Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 n’est plus seulement l’arme des streamers [Sponso]
item.description: Popularisé par Twitch et YouTube, l’Elgato Stream Deck MK.2 est souvent rangé un peu trop vite dans la catégorie des accessoires pour streamers. En 2026, c’est pourtant devenu un véritable tableau de bord pour power users : macros, raccourcis système, commandes Spotify, profils de jeu, actions pour développeurs, automatisations et même intégrations liées à l’IA. Actuellement proposé à 123 euros au lieu de 149 euros, il mérite clairement qu’on s’y intéresse, même si vous ne lancez jamais OBS. ...

item.title: Anthropic lance Fable 5, son IA « Mythos » la plus puissante, mais bridée volontairement
item.description: Anthropic ouvre aujourd'hui au grand public le modèle le plus puissant qu'il ait jamais rendu accessible, Claude Fable 5. Il est gros, et ce monstre de calcul refuse de répondre sur certains sujets et bascule alors vers une IA moins douée.

item.title: On-device AI agents hit a hard memory limit. Apple's new architecture routes around it.
item.description: On-device AI models have stayed small because the entire weight set has to live in DRAM, capping practical parameter counts well below what server-side deployments use. Enterprise architects evaluating agentic workloads have had to choose between capable cloud-dependent models and limited on-device ones. Apple's third-generation foundation models, announced at WWDC26, break that constraint by moving the weight set off DRAM entirely.The AFM 3 family was developed in collaboration with Google and spans five models: two on-device and three server-based, all running within Apple's Private Cloud Co...

item.title: Opera's latest Android update includes a soccer hub and a refreshed start page
item.description: Opera's new Android update includes a soccer hub in time for the World Cup.

item.title: JBL Bar 500MK2, Nintendo Switch 2 et batterie Xiaomi : les meilleures promos high-tech du mardi 9 juin 2026
item.description: Chaque jour, notre rédaction repère pour vous les meilleurs bons plans high‑tech du moment. Découvrez ici celle du mardi 9 juin 2026.

item.title: CISA gives US federal agencies three days to fix a VPN bug under attack by a ransomware gang
item.description: Check Point said hackers broke into dozens of organizations by exploiting a VPN bug in several of its products used across the government.

item.title: Marshall's Stockwell III portable speaker offers more than 40 hours of use per charge
item.description: Marshall's Stockwell III portable speaker runs 40 hours on a charge and costs $250.

item.title: Fitbit’s Charge 6 and Ace LTE are now as cheap as the new $100 Air
item.description: Whether you’re shopping for Father’s Day or trying to keep your kids entertained over summer break, you don’t need to spend a fortune to get a great Fitbit right now. You can currently pick up the Fitbit Charge 6 for $50 off at Amazon, Best Buy, and Target, the Fitbit Ace LTE for $80 off […]

item.title: Best World Cup 2026 eSIM deals — Stay connected from the opening game to the final whistle
item.description: As football fever strikes, I'm tracking the top eSIM deals for this year's World Cup in the US, Canada, and Mexico.

item.title: MacOS 27 Golden Gate: Top New Features
item.description: Apple has announced the latest version of macOS. It's all about the reintroduction of Siri, which is now accessible from anywhere on the Mac desktop.

item.title: J’ai testé le casque Marshall Milton ANC : le style avant le son
item.description: Marshall lance le Milton ANC à 199 euros. Ce modèle qui se pose sur les oreilles mise sur le design, l'autonomie et une réduction de bruit adaptative inédite chez la marque. Mais sa courbe de réponse pose un vrai problème d'équilibre.

item.title: Amazon wants to end dodgy knockoffs with its own AI-generated custom merch printing
item.description: Amazon wants users to design their own AI-generated artwork to print onto clothing or drinkware – shipping available via Prime.

item.title: Anthropic brings Mythos to the masses with Claude Fable 5, its most powerful generally available model ever
item.description: Anthropic today launched two new AI models — Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 — marking the company’s first broad release of the powerful “Mythos-class” AI capabilities it previously made available only to participating organizations in its restricted cybersecurity program, Project Glasswing, which it announced two months ago.The company says Fable 5, which is the version most users and developers will get starting today, exceeds every Claude model it has previously made generally available — featuring stronger performance across software engineering, knowledge work, vision, scientific resea...

item.title: Apple wants Europe to blink
item.description: It took a few years, but Apple finally made its AI look useful. Now millions of iPhone users in Europe are being told they won't be getting Siri AI anytime soon, if ever - and Apple wants them to blame the EU. Apple says its new AI-powered Siri will not launch on iPhones and iPads […]

item.title: Anthropic rend publique son IA la plus puissante, mais la restreint dans des domaines sensibles
item.description: Anthropic, éditrice des modèles d’intelligence artificielle (IA) Claude, a mis mardi à la disposition du grand public la version la plus puissante de sa technologie tout en la bridant dans des domaines sensibles comme la cybersécurité et, fait nouveau, les risques d’attaque biologique ou chimique.

item.title: The Top New Features in Apple’s iOS 27 and iPadOS 27
item.description: Apple took the wraps off iOS 27 at its WWDC event, and the iPhone update is chock-full of smart upgrades, with a big focus on improvements to Siri.

item.title: Anthropic Offers Mythos Upgrade for Cyber Partners and a ‘Safe’ Version for the Rest of You
item.description: Anthropic is releasing Claude Mythos 5 to trusted organizations and Claude Fable 5 to the public, a version it says can’t be used for cyberattacks.

item.title: Anthropic releases its first Mythos-class model Claude Fable
item.description: Anthropic just announced Claude Fable 5, a new AI model it said is the most powerful model it has ever made widely available. According to the company, Fable 5 "shows exceptional performance in software engineering, knowledge work, and vision," with its lead over other models growing as tasks become longer and more complex. Fable 5 […]

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Fable 5 is a version of Mythos the public can access today
item.description: Anthropic is releasing Claude Fable 5, its first Mythos-class model available to the public. The model comes with guardrails that block responses in high-risk areas like cybersecurity and biology.

item.title: Secretlab's already perfected the gaming chair — and now it's going for the home office market with its new Atlas model
item.description: Secretlab's stylish new task chair will save you from having to put an embarrassing gaming chair in your home office.

item.title: I've spent over 35 hours sitting in Secretlab's new Atlas task chair and there's a lot I like about it — but I'm still not sure it will dethrone my Herman Miller
item.description: The Secretlab Atlas has proved a capable task chair in our testing so far.

item.title: Bowers & Wilkins just blew me away with its new 801 D5 speakers — here’s what I made of the model after attending a demo at at High End Vienna
item.description: I tried the new flagship speaker in B&W’s Diamond range, and I was truly blown away.

item.title: Why I wouldn't buy a super-cheap huge-screen TV for the World Cup as someone who watches 60 games per year — the 'dirty screen effect' is brutal for watching football
item.description: Backlight uniformity issues on LCD 4K TVs have ruined many a football match for this AV dork — don't pick the wrong big-screen upgrade

item.title: Test du Secretlab Atlas : quand le spécialiste du gaming s’attaque au vrai fauteuil de bureau
item.description: Secretlab pose enfin un fauteuil dans mon salon sans que tout le monde devine que je joue : l'Atlas tente la sobriété, et c'était la première chose à vérifier.

item.title: Voici la meilleure offre pour s’offrir un téléviseur LG OLED à prix cassé juste avant la Coupe du Monde
item.description: Si vous cherchez à vous équiper d'un TV OLED sans vous ruiner, le LG OLED48B5 s'affiche aujourd'hui au tarif inédit de 693,22 euros au lieu de 1 299 euros au lancement. Une offre qui tombe à pic avec le lancement de la Coupe du Monde.

item.title: SwitchBot’s E Ink Weather Station is already 20 percent off
item.description: We’re only a few days since the SwitchBot Smart E Ink Weather Station launched, and you can already save $25 on the smart home gadget. Visit Amazon and clip the on-page coupon to bring the price down to $85 at checkout, or use coupon code APAP23 on the SwitchBot site. The 7.5-inch framed panel shows […]

item.title: Hold out for a little longer FromSoft fans — The Duskbloods will get a closed network test this summer, but a release date for the full game has yet to be announced
item.description: A brand new trailer for FromSoftware's next game, The Duskbloods, has been revealed, alongside a release window for a closed network test.

item.title: Kingdom Hearts IV gets a surprise Nintendo Direct trailer drop
item.description: Out of nowhere, we have a new trailer for Kingdom Hearts IV.

item.title: Siri AI first look: How Apple's rebuilt AI-powered assistant behaves across iPhone, iPad and Mac
item.description: Here's your first look at Siri AI, and how it works across Apple's devices.

item.title: Rivian starts deliveries of its all-important R2 SUV
item.description: Founder and CEO RJ Scaringe has called it "maybe the most important thing we've launched to date."

item.title: I tried Siri AI on the iPhone, Mac, and iPad — here's why I'm convinced Apple's long-overdue next-gen assistant will win you over
item.description: We got an up-close look at the new Siri AI in action on multiple platforms, and, even in dev beta, the power and promise are unmistakable.

item.title: 'The biggest risk of AI is over-reliance': How AI is changing the way web agencies deliver value
item.description: I caught up with Suhaib Zaheer, SVP, Managed Hosting at DigitalOcean & GM, Cloudways, to get his thoughts on how AI is transforming the web agency space

item.title: New iOS 27 Passwords app can automatically change your passwords for you
item.description: Passwords has always been good at identifying weak or compromised passwords – now, Apple Intelligence will change them for you.

item.title: The next Nintendo sports game for Switch 2 features thumb wrestling
item.description: Nintendo's next sports game bundle will include... thumb wrestling?

item.title: Recharge en moins de 5 minutes : BYD lance son réseau Flash Charging en Europe avec 3 000 stations prévues, et la France dans le viseur
item.description: BYD vient de franchir une étape en Europe avec l'ouverture de sa première station de recharge Flash Charging en Allemagne, capable de recharger une voiture électrique en 5 minutes. Le constructeur chinois pose les jalons d'un réseau d'infrastructure qui lui est propre, sur un continent où la question de la charge rapide reste encore largement ouverte, et qui n'est pas sans rappeler Tesla et ses fameux Superchargeurs. ...

item.title: iOS 27 adds long-desired iPhone volume control feature
item.description: iOS 27 finally lets iPhone users set independent volume for ringtones, alarms, and alerts. Here's how to find the new setting.

item.title: This $160 office chair deal with adaptive lumbar support is easily the best budget upgrade I've seen ahead of Prime Day — and it's cheaper now than it was in the Spring sale
item.description: Adaptive lumbar support for all-day comfort at this price doesn't come around very often.

item.title: Big Walk is an oddball blend of Peak and Escape Academy, and it's out August 4
item.description: Big Walk, from the creators of Untitled Goose Game, will be available August 4.

item.title: Its official: OpenAI files IPO
item.description: We knew it was coming, but OpenAI has made its intent to go public official, setting the stage for a blockbuster IPO season.

item.title: NASA announces the crew of its critical Artemis III mission
item.description: NASA has announced the crew of its critical Artemis III.

item.title: B&H Photo has slashed the price of my ‘favorite camera bag’ — grab the Wandrd Prvke V3 photo bundle for just $150
item.description: My favorite camera bag that doesn't look like a camera bag has to be the Wandrd Prvke series — and the previous V3 generation version is now 50% off.

item.title: Apple’s foldable iPhone could be just around the corner
item.description: The iOS 27 developer beta includes code that references the fold state and screen angle of a device.

item.title: iOS 27 ajoute enfin des contrôles du volume indépendants
item.description: Il aura fallu attendre des années, mais cette fois, ça y est : vous pourrez ajuster le volume de la sonnerie, des notifications et des alarmes séparément sur iPhone.

item.title: Dreame X60 Pro Ultra Complete : ce robot aspirateur ultrapuissant (42 000 Pa) livré avec une station polyvalente est un peu moins hors de prix grâce à ces 200 € de réduction
item.description: Vrai concentré de puissance, le récent Dreame X60 Pro Ultra Complete est un robot aspirateur très abouti, qui s'occupe de la corvée de ménage comme un pro. Actuellement, Amazon le propose à 1 299 euros au lieu de 1 499 euros.

item.title: These 9 early Prime Day outdoor deals will get you prepped for summer
item.description: Amazon Prime Day has outdoor deals of up to 50% off from brands like Anker Solix, Solo Stove, Govee, and robot lawn mowers.

item.title: ‘The best thing we’ve ever made’: Jason Momoa turns his 100-year-old Harleys into new electric classics — and you can buy the same ‘drop-in’ conversion kits
item.description: Jason Momoa and UK conversion specialist Electrogenic team up to work on electrifying Hollywood star's classic collection.

item.title: Snap up buys on a budget with the best early Prime Day deals under $100
item.description: As of June 9, these are the best early Prime Day deals under $100.

item.title: Apple is embracing the fantasy of AI photo editing
item.description: Apple used to question whether generative AI-powered editing features were worth the risk of distorting our perceptions of the world. Now it seems Apple no longer believes that photos should accurately capture reality. At WWDC 2026, the company announced a host of new AI-powered photo editing tools. They give users effortless powers of manipulating images […]...

item.title: Pourquoi les panneaux solaires seuls ne suffisent plus : la batterie, nouvelle arme fatale des fabricants chinois
item.description: Alors que l’industrie photovoltaïque traverse toujours des périodes difficiles, les fabricants chinois ont trouvé la parade : le stockage. Après les panneaux solaires, c’est peut-être bientôt au tour des batteries de remplir le marché mondial.
